question_title: What will be Namibia's annual inflation rate for March 2026?
summary: Namibia's March 2026 annual inflation is forecast to be around 3.4%, with significant uncertainty. Key factors: (1) December 2025 inflation at 3.2% (lowest in 2025), (2) favorable base effect from elevated March 2025 (4.2%), (3) Bank of Namibia forecasts 3.8-4.3% average for 2026, (4) South Africa inflation expected ~3% (currency peg). The base effect from high March 2025 will compress YoY rates, but modest uptick expected through 2026. Distribution is slightly right-skewed for supply shock risks.

factors.description: December 2025 inflation at 3.2% - lowest point in 2025, indicates declining trend
Favorable base effect: March 2025 was elevated at 4.2%, making YoY comparison easier
Bank of Namibia forecasts 3.8-4.3% average for 2026 - expect uptick from current lows
South Africa inflation expected ~3% in 2026 (currency peg creates anchor)
Food inflation was elevated in mid-2025 (5.8%) - could resurge
Services inflation trending higher (4.0% in Dec 2025 vs 3.9% prior year)

resolution_criteria: This question resolves to the 'Annual inflation rate' (percentage change) for the month of March 2026 according to [TradingEconomics](https://tradingeconomics.com/namibia/inflation-cpi) or (in the event of material issues with the main resolution source) as reported by the Namibia Statistics Agency (NSA) in its monthly Consumer Price Index (CPI) bulletin. The value used for resolution will be the headline annual inflation rate (All Items) expressed as a percentage.
fine_print: If the NSA revises the March 2026 figure in a subsequent monthly report, the first published figure for March 2026 will be used for resolution unless a clear clerical error is identified. If the NSA ceases to publish CPI data, data from the Bank of Namibia or the International Monetary Fund (IMF) may be used as substitutes. For more on credible sources, see: [https://www.metaculus.com/faq/#definitions](https://www.metaculus.com/faq/#definitions)
background_info:
This question tracks the headline annual inflation rate in Namibia for the month of March 2026. Annual inflation is measured as the year-on-year percentage change in the Consumer Price Index (CPI) compared to March 2025.
